title: WorkItem
description: An Azure DevOps work item (Bug, Task, User Story, etc.)

id.description: Unique numeric identifier of the work item

rev.description: Revision number of the work item (increments on each update)

fields.description: Dynamic map of field reference names to values. Common fields include System.Title, System.State, System.AssignedTo, System.Description, System.WorkItemType, System.AreaPath, System.IterationPath, etc.

relations.description: Links and relations to other work items or external resources

_links.description: HAL links for navigating related resources

url.description: URL to access this work item via the REST API
